reviews.comment:
Mi sorpresa tenían tostados sin gluten, un plussss y el café te lo llevan a la mesa con agua, muy  bien...excelente atención,  pero el lugar se quedó en la historia, falta modernizar el lugar, la verdad no está agradable, por eso 3 🌟. La idea es descansar y disfrutar de un buen café, ya que nos es barato ningún YPF. No aumenten tantos los precios x favor!!!

Saludos YPF
Consumo hasta la Nafta, pero no suban tanto...

(Translated by Google)
To my surprise, they had gluten-free toast, a great bonus! And they bring the coffee to your table with water, very nice... excellent service, but the place is stuck in the past; it needs modernizing. It's not very pleasant, hence the 3 stars. The idea is to relax and enjoy a good coffee, since no YPF station is cheap. Please don't raise prices so much!

Regards, YPF. I even buy gasoline, but please don't raise prices so much...

reviews.comment:

Beautiful place, and for ACA members, they have a wonderful park. Excellent if you're traveling, stopping here for a break, and relaxing!
